ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image processing operation */,
  "system_time" INTEGER /* System time taken for the operation */,
  "thread_time" INTEGER /* Thread time taken for the operation */,
  "proc_real" INTEGER /* Processor real time taken for the operation */,
  "proc_user" INTEGER /* Processor user time taken for the operation */,
  "proc_system" INTEGER /* Processor system time taken for the operation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the operation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the operation */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if an error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if an error occurred */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the programming language used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of the operation (e.g., metadata read/write) */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file involved in the operation */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the programming language used */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the system on which the operation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES system_info ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_operation_type FOREIGN KEY ("operation_type") REFERENCES operation_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "image_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the language */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used alongside the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, QA) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_info" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version */,
  "cpu_info" TEXT /* CPU information */,
  "memory_info" TEXT /* Memory information */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thread_info" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "thread_name" TEXT /* Name of the thread */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the thread */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the thread */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operation associated with the thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thread_info_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processor_info" (
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processor */,
  "processor_name" TEXT /* Name of the processor */,
  "core_count" INTEGER /* Number of cores */,
  "clock_speed" TEXT /* Clock speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system metric entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the system */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the operation */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the operation */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage during the operation */,
  "network_usage" REAL /* Network usage during the operation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the system during the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_metrics_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES system_info ("system_id")
)
